nasb.text: I will drive them out before you little by little, until you become fruitful and take possession of the land.

esv.text: Little by little I will drive them out from before you, until you have increased and possess the land.

cnv.text: 我要漸漸地把他們從你面前驅逐出去，等到你的人數增多起來，承受那地為止。

ccb.text: 我会逐渐地赶走他们，直到你们人丁兴旺，可以占据那片土地。
